Class VaultProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.vault.config.VaultProperties
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.Aware, org.springframework.context.EnvironmentAware
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.vault") public class VaultProperties extends Object implements org.springframework.context.EnvironmentAware
Properties to configure Vault support.
Author:
Spencer Gibb, Mark Paluch, Kevin Holditch, Michal Budzyn, Grenville Wilson, Mårten Svantesson, Issam El-atif
